info.hindI_arTa: DAraRa karanA pAlana karanA denA arpaRa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: kzIraahataraNgiRI prayogaM pradarSya vadati - "dada DAraRe daDa dAne iti pAWaH eva yuktaH iti kecit  ' kOSikastu ' dada DAraRe ' daDa dAne ' iti pAWaM vyatyAsTat - dadate maRim daDate DanamarTiByaH iti  yuktAyuktatve tvatra sUrayaH eva pramARam  vayaM hi mataBedapradarSanamAtreRa eva kftArTAH  mUnimuKyAnAM vAkyaM kaTaNkAraM vikalpayAmaH ? vayamapi hi sKalantonyEH kiyanna upalapsyAmahe ? " iti  ( dAnArTakaH ' dada ' DAtuH 17 ityatra  )
